title: omphalea queenslandiae
intro: Omphalea queenslandiae, also known as Queensland milkfruit, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, native to tropical Australia and New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Omphalea queenslandiae include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into a paste or juice, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
